subject: LU-8619 lbuild: update ZFS to use 0.7.1

values.-1: I would prefer that you didn't submit this
values.+1: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

Patch Set 7:

Nathaniel and Jinshan, could you please look into the test results here. It seems there is a consistent failure of sanity-quota when running review-zfs-part-1, which may be caused by the dnode quota accounting change in ZFS. It would be bad if 0.7.0 or 2.10 was released and we found it had a bug that we could have fixed earlier. Doubly bad if that affected the on-disk format of ZFS, since there is no zfsck tool to fix the filesystem afterward.

commit.subject: LU-8619 lbuild: update ZFS to use 0.7.1
commit.message:
LU-8619 lbuild: update ZFS to use 0.7.1

Update lbuild to build against ZFS 0.7.1

Changelog: https://github.com/zfsonlinux/zfs/releases/tag/zfs-0.7.1
